# Test all features of sourcereflect

# 1. Show help
exec sourcereflect -help
stderr 'Usage of'

# 2. Generate basic schema
exec sourcereflect -type Person person.go
stdout '{"type":"object",'

# 3. Generate pretty schema
exec sourcereflect -pretty -type Person person.go
stdout '{\n  "type": "object",'

# 4. Generate schema with caller info
exec sourcereflect -pretty -type Person -caller person.go
stdout '"file":'

-- person.go --
package main

type Person struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Age  int    `json:"age,omitempty"`
}
